flags.usage: Database adapter used throughout all services
flags.isolation_status: Dynamic linking — LGPL applies to the compiled C extension only
flags.notes: LGPL applies to the compiled C extension (.so). Python application code linking against it is not subject to LGPL. The -binary distribution ships a pre-compiled adapter. This is standard commercial practice accepted by thousands of production Python applications.
flags.replacement: asyncpg (Apache 2.0) for async services; psycopg3 (LGPL-2.1, same situation)
